name: Cloak of the Deep
description: Notes Holding spacebar and shooting example:
effects: Inhale: While holding down the ability key, drain 50 MP/sec and become Weak. Exhale: While holding down the ability key, release a stream of bubbles whilst shooting scaling with your Lethal Strike Damage. Lethal Strike: Your weapon deals 60 (+0.5 per WIS > 34) and 10% (+0.5% per WIS > 34) of target’s defense as additional damage for 1.4 seconds Cooldown: 0 / 0.4 / 0.6 sec Damage: 55-75 (average: 65) Shots: 4 Range: 5.14 tiles Shots hit multiple targets Ignores defense of target
